sector-card-let-agent-draft: Let the agent draft this section
legacy-route-unavailable-description: The inventory could not be loaded for the documented city-scoped draft route.
selector-description: Choose one city and one GHGI inventory before starting the bounded Stationary Energy workflow.
selector-flags-title: Enable `CA_SERVICE_INTEGRATION` and `STATIONARY_ENERGY_AGENTIC` to use this workflow.
selector-flags-description: This page does not create a draft until both flags are enabled and a target inventory is selected.
selector-search-placeholder: Search cities, countries, regions, or years
chat-page-feature-disabled: Enable CA_SERVICE_INTEGRATION and STATIONARY_ENERGY_AGENTIC to use this workflow.
chat-panel-ask-about-proposal: Can you explain the connected source proposal for {{label}}?
chat-panel-placeholder-review: Ask about a source or row before deciding...
chat-review-completion-can-save-inventor: Done. Review the working draft on the left, save it in Clima, or commit it to the inventory when you are ready.
chat-review-completion-can-save-draft: Review complete. Save this draft in Clima now if you want to come back later.
chat-review-completion-nothing-ready: Review complete. Nothing is ready to save yet.
chat-review-empty-state-has-proposals: Review complete. No source-backed rows are staged to save.
chat-review-empty-state-no-proposals: No source-backed proposals are available to save from the current connected datasets.
chat-quick-reply-set-notation-reply: Understood. Rows without a usable source can stay empty for now, and you can apply a notation key before saving if needed.
chat-source-preference-reply-prefer: Got it. I will use {{sourceName}} where it fits the reviewed source options.
chat-source-preference-reply-no-preferen: Got it. I will keep the current source ranking.
chat-start-intro: I can help complete the Stationary Energy sector using third-party data already integrated with this inventory.
chat-start-review-prompt: Want me to draft the empty rows? You can review every value before saving.
chat-start-choose-sources-reply: Understood. Tell me which source to prefer and I will use it where it fits the reviewed source options.
chat-drafting-started: Starting now. I will draft each empty Stationary Energy row from the integrated sources.
chat-drafting-status: Drafting rows and comparing source coverage...
chat-decision-summary: Most rows are drafted. {{pendingDecisionLabel}}; I marked those reviews below and will keep them in this chat history while we discuss anything else.
chat-saved-summary: Saved. The reviewed source-backed rows are already committed to the inventory.
chat-review-later-notation: Rows without a usable source can stay empty or be handled later with a notation key.
chat-save-draft-success: Draft saved in Clima. You can reopen it later from the draft list.
chat-save-inventory-success: Saved. Accepted rows are now committed to the inventory.
error-failed-to-load-stationary-energy-d: Failed to load Stationary Energy drafts
Failed to load Stationary Energy draft status
error-failed-to-resume-stationary-energy: Failed to resume Stationary Energy draft
error-failed-to-create-clima-chat-thread: Failed to create Clima chat thread
error-failed-to-start-stationary-energy-: Failed to start Stationary Energy draft
error-failed-to-save-stationary-energy-d: Failed to save Stationary Energy draft decisions
error-failed-to-save-accepted-stationary: Failed to save accepted Stationary Energy rows
error-chat-history-unavailable: Clima chat history is unavailable, but the draft can still run.
error-draft-start-response-missing-run-i: Draft start response did not include draft_run_id.
source-does-not-match-stationary-energy-: Selected source does not match the reviewed Stationary Energy target
